About.bio: Fine Art and Commercial Photographer, SVA New York graduate. Driven by a deep understanding of an artist's needs and backed by extensive experience with leading clients locally and worldwide. I offer precise and meticulous artwork reproduction photography (at my Tel Aviv studio or on-site at your location). The process utilizes tethered shooting directly to a computer for real-time viewing, and includes final digital retouching and cleaning to ensure absolute fidelity to the original piece.
